name: Stir-Fried Asian Tofu
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces firm tofu, drained and pressed for 30 minutes
1/2 teaspoon grated tangerine or lemon zest
4 ounces mushrooms, stemmed and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu into 3/4-inch squares and marinate in citrus zest and juice; season with salt and pepper.
2. Combine hoisin, rice vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch in a separate bowl for later use.
3. Heat vegetable and sesame oils in a 12-inch skillet until very hot.
4. Add garlic and ginger to the skillet and stir fry for 10 seconds.
5. Add mushrooms and broccoli with some water, cover, and steam for 2 minutes or until mushrooms and broccoli begin to become tender.
6. Add tofu to the skillet and stir to recombine the cornstarch mixture.
7. Cover and simmer for 30 seconds to a minute to thicken the sauce.
8. Season with salt and crushed red pepper.
Yield: 2 servings
